Morning7:00 AM depart ORD

Fly to San Jose (SJO)

AA 1902 ORD → DFW 7:02-9:40a. 1:26 layover. AA 1053 DFW → SJO 11:06a-2:17p. Chicago group; NYC crew routes separately.

AA 1902 + AA 1053Land SJO 2:17pChicago group

Jul 23 · Thursday · Day 2

La Fortuna: volcano, waterfall & hot springs

Full-day tour6 AM pickupLunch + dinner included
1
Early6:00 AM

Pickup at the AirbnbBe ready 5:45

Guided tour pickup at the main entrance of Playa Hermosa Palms. Scenic ride to the Arenal area, ~3 hrs.

🎒 Pack a drawstring bag
SwimwearChange of clothesTowelSandalsComfortable shoesSunscreenSunglassesInsect repellent
Round-trip transportBilingual guide~3 hr drive
Open in MapsView tour details
🚌Scenic drive through volcanoes, plantations and jungle to La Fortuna
2
Late morning~10:00 AM

La Fortuna Waterfall

Swim in the pool at the base of Costa Rica's most iconic waterfall. Rainforest all around; steps down and back up.

Swim stopWaterfall entry includedBring sandals
Open in Maps
🚌Short drive to La Fortuna town for lunch
3
Midday~12:30 PM

Costa Rican lunchIncluded

Authentic lunch at a restaurant near La Fortuna town. Included in the tour.

Lunch includedLa Fortuna town
Open in Maps
🚌To the 1968 lava trails
4
Afternoon~2:00 PM

Lava trails & Arenal viewpoint

Hike the lava trails from the 1968 eruption and hit the main lookout for the best Arenal views on clear days.

Lava trail hikeVolcano lookoutTrail entry included
Open in Maps
🚌To Paradise Hot Springs at the volcano base
5
Late afternoon~4:00 PM

Paradise Hot Springs

Soak a couple of hours in the hot spring pools set in tropical gardens at the base of Arenal.

Hot springs included~2 hrsVolcano views

Evening~7:00 PM

Jul 24 · Friday · Day 3

Jaco: ATV, pool & a night out

~85°F / 29°CChef breakfastNight out
1
Morning8:00 AM

Chef breakfast at the housePrivate chef

Private chef cooks breakfast at the Airbnb: omelettes and pancakes, with coffee, OJ, breads and pastries, seasonal fruit and potatoes.

Omelettes + pancakesCoffee & OJFruit & pastries
Open in Maps
🚌Gear up: ATV pickup late morning
2
Late morning11:00 AM-1:00 PM

ATV jungle tour

Two hours through jungle and back trails. It gets muddy, so wear shoes and clothes you're fine throwing away afterward.

🎒 Pack a drawstring bag
Closed-toe shoes you can trashClothes you can tossSunglassesSunscreen
~2 hrsGets muddyThrowaway clothes
Open in Maps
🚌Back to the Airbnb to rinse off
3
Afternoon~2:00-6:00 PM

Pool & chill

Downtime at the house. Pool, drinks, recover before dinner.

Pool dayRecharge
Open in Maps
🚌~10 min to Plaza Tangeri for dinner
4
Evening7:15 PM

Dinner at Naans & CurriesReserve for the group

Indian dinner at Naans & Curries, Plaza Tangeri. Strong veg options for the group. Mains ₡7,990-12,990 (~$15-25); 13% tax + 10% service added.

Butter ChickenLamb Rogan JoshPaneer Tikka Masala (veg)Garlic naan
Open in MapsMenu & website
5
Night11:00 PM

Out in Jaco

Jaco's nightlife runs along Av. Pastor Diaz, a few minutes from the house. Le Loft and Republik are the big dance clubs; Orange Pub and Los Amigos are the busy bar scene; the Beatle Bar goes latest; Puddlefish is the craft-beer pick.

🍸 NightlifeLe LoftRepublikOrange PubLos AmigosBeatle BarPuddlefish Brewery
Clubs & barsWalkable stripGoes late
Open in Maps

Playa Jaco

Head to the beach for the afternoon. Swim, surf, sunset.

SunscreenTowelCash for drinks
Swim & surfSunset spot
Open in Maps
🚌Back to the house to clean up for dinner
3
Evening7:00 PM

Chef dinner at the housePrivate chef

Big private-chef dinner at the Airbnb: empanadas with pico to start, Mexican chicken in jalapeno-tequila sauce, rosemary potatoes, and Tres Leches for dessert. Veg option covered (coconut rice & beans, salad, picadillo, fried cheese, avocado, eggs).

Empanadas + picoJalapeno-tequila chickenVeg optionTres Leches

NightLate

House party

Pool, music, drinks. Last big night at the house.
